name: verify-after-subagent
description: Run type checking and tests after sub-agents complete implementation work

hooks.prompt:
A sub-agent just completed. Before proceeding:

1. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify no type errors were introduced
2. If type errors exist in test files, the sub-agent likely modified types without updating test fixtures
3. Report any errors found so they can be fixed before continuing

This verification prevents broken builds from accumulating across parallel agents.
